label: Immersive Dark
description: Product workspace variant for gaming, AI, creator tools, and intense app moods.
signatureMotif: immersive dark shell, glowing action states, and dramatic workspace framing
promptHints: Treat the shell as a product world, not just a sidebar plus content column.
Use contrast and atmosphere to make the workspace feel owned by a specific domain.

layouts: Use a cinematic app shell with a left rail, top command bar, and a central stage panel framed like a live control room.
Build dashboard pages as layered workspaces with one dominant canvas, a right-side inspector drawer, and compact status cards pinned around it.
Compose chat or creator screens with a full-height conversation pane, sticky input dock, and floating model or session controls above the fold.
Arrange analytics or lobby views as a dramatic hero metric band over a dense grid of dark cards, with one glowing primary action anchoring the scene.
Use modal flows as centered command chambers with dimmed shell surroundings, stacked step panels, and a visible high-contrast confirm action.
motifs: Dark graphite surfaces should stack in depth, with soft inner shadows, thin cool borders, and neon pink or electric blue action glows.
Cards should feel like illuminated equipment: near-black fills, 0.95rem corners, subtle edge highlights, and brighter active states than resting surfaces.
Navigation and controls should read like a game or creator cockpit, with compact pills, luminous toggles, and focused panels floating over the shell.
Use contrast like atmosphere, letting bright text, live dots, and saturated action accents puncture large fields of controlled darkness.
antiPatterns: Avoid flat monochrome admin dashboards with equal-weight cards everywhere; this variant needs a clear focal stage and depth hierarchy.
Never use airy white surfaces, pastel gradients, or friendly startup illustrations; they break the owned, high-intensity product-world mood.
Avoid generic website framing where content sits in one centered column; the shell should feel immersive, surrounding, and operational.
Do not rely on soft beige warmth, rounded playful blobs, or oversized marketing icons; this style wants tension, precision, and controlled glow.
